data.content: Handoff: Implementation complete. Branch: worktree-foolery-00e9-bulk-tags (pushed to origin). Commit: 07493d477c6737aeaef93cb22d216917167e8beb. Bulk label/tag editor added to Queues multi-select and the four inline Set-dropdowns consolidated into one 'Edit fields' popover (bar uses flex-wrap, no horizontal scroll). Reuses onBulkUpdate({labels}/{removeLabels}); no new route/schema. State options stay loom-derived. New files under src/components/bulk/. Gates green: lint, tsc --noEmit, test (2860 pass), build. Manual bulk source-grep tests repointed and green; remaining test:manual failures (install-launcher-path, foolery-config) are pre-existing host-env tests unrelated to this change.
